# Check: 02 — deltav mpmath
# Claim: L2-photon-speed
# Run: 2026-04-24 04:05
# Tool: python3 3.14.4 / mpmath 1.3.0 (80 digits)
# Script: verification/check_02_deltav_mpmath.py
# L2 Check 2 — Delta_v with mpmath 80-digit precision
# Convention: c denotes causality limit; v_photon < c strictly.

c (causality)            = 299792458.0 m/s
m_gamma (GCM)            = 1.0e-54 kg
E (photon example)       = 1.0 eV = 0.0000000000000000001602176634 J

m_gamma * c^2            = 8.9875517873681764e-38 J
epsilon = m_g c^2 / E    = 0.00000000000000000056095886038044519378504430242489730380127363659954611471384122058042696433432071
epsilon^2                = 3.1467484303932780454101361934967116623034765373937531344770690157320111256165135e-37

v_photon = c sqrt(1-ε²)  = 299792457.99999999999999999999999999995283142766723786340445298262184285978832805 m/s  (80-digit)
Δv = c - v (direct)       = 4.7168572332762136595547017378157140211671949428487000064790878586304569013844887e-29 m/s

Δv ≈ c ε²/2  (Taylor)     = 4.7168572332762136595547017378157140207961258654530108301504253243097014231596068e-29 m/s
rel diff direct vs Taylor = 7.8668710763152284672153419154632282806471863307354066427019624787137377152391067e-38

Session brief stated Δv   = 4.74e-29 m/s
relative error to brief   = 0.0048824402370857258323414055241109659984820795677848087596861057741652106783779046
  (brief is 2-sig-fig; 0.4% is rounding of stated inputs, not computational)

Δv / c                    = 1.5733742151966390227050680967483558312755135897543826824619743631544116101094474e-37
  (~10^-37, below any experimental sensitivity)

STATUS: PASS
  v_photon < c_causality confirmed (structural, per L1 commitment m_gamma > 0)
# Exit: 0
